interactionContract: Every clickable control has an accessible name, keyboard activation, visible focus, an expected state change, a typed failure state, and source provenance. Authority-bearing outcomes render only after server confirmation.

interactions.control: Workspace identity menu compatibility hook; no dish interface is rendered
interactions.stateChange: Open workspace details and authorized switch actions without changing profile inline
interactions.failure: Keep current workspace and explain that switching is unavailable

interactions.stateChange: Begin one server-owned OIDC transaction
interactions.failure: Keep the entry page, show a correlation-safe error, and offer Retry

interactions.stateChange: Set the pending presentation experience and continue
interactions.failure: Keep focus in the group and announce that a choice is required

interactions.stateChange: Set the pending workspace type without granting membership
interactions.failure: Preserve the last valid choice and explain the requirement

interactions.control: Local, ask every run, or Cloud Preview
interactions.stateChange: Set the pending placement policy and expose truthful readiness
interactions.failure: Keep Local available and do not imply fallback

interactions.stateChange: Create an authorized workspace once and focus its heading
interactions.failure: Keep entered values and show the stable reason code

interactions.stateChange: Redeem a valid invitation once and enter the returned workspace
interactions.failure: Do not change membership; explain expired, used, or unauthorized invitations

interactions.stateChange: Create or focus an empty governed thread composer
interactions.failure: Keep the current thread and expose Retry

interactions.stateChange: Open search with keyboard focus and workspace-scoped results
interactions.failure: Keep the query and distinguish unavailable from no results

interactions.stateChange: Open the authorized thread and restore its persisted cursor
interactions.failure: Keep selection context and show access, missing, or retry state

interactions.stateChange: Open the file picker and stage an allowed attachment reference
interactions.failure: Remove rejected data and explain size, type, scope, or runtime limits

interactions.stateChange: Open capability-filtered commands without replacing draft text
interactions.failure: Keep the draft and announce that no commands are available

interactions.stateChange: Bind an advertised provider/model to the pending run
interactions.failure: Keep the last ready binding and explain unavailable capability

interactions.stateChange: Select an authorized placement compatible with data, tools, and credentials
interactions.failure: Do not fall back silently; explain the mismatch

interactions.stateChange: Set a bounded autonomy policy for the pending run
interactions.failure: Keep the stricter policy and explain the enforced limit

interactions.stateChange: Open a prefilled schedule editor without sending the message
interactions.failure: Preserve the draft and explain missing schedule capability

interactions.stateChange: Persist the message and submit one idempotent governed run, then change to Stop
interactions.failure: Preserve the draft or persisted message and offer a safe retry without duplication

interactions.stateChange: Request cancellation once and show stopping until confirmed
interactions.failure: Keep truthful run state and offer force/kill only when authorized

interactions.stateChange: Create an idempotent retry from the persisted failure boundary
interactions.failure: Keep the terminal event visible and show the reason code

interactions.stateChange: Create a new thread from the selected authorized message checkpoint
interactions.failure: Keep the source thread open and explain why the checkpoint cannot fork

interactions.stateChange: Resume from the persisted cursor without replaying prior effects
interactions.failure: Keep the exact recovery boundary visible

interactions.stateChange: Select a persisted stage and open its evidence
interactions.failure: Keep the route visible and explain missing or redacted evidence

interactions.stateChange: Open a safe preview or approved download action in the inspector
interactions.failure: Keep metadata visible and explain unavailable or quarantined content

interactions.stateChange: Submit one scoped approval and advance only after server confirmation
interactions.failure: Leave the run at Approval and show expired, changed, or unauthorized state

interactions.stateChange: Record the rejection reason and stop the gated effect
interactions.failure: Keep the gate pending and preserve entered explanation

interactions.stateChange: Close contextual detail and restore focus to its trigger
interactions.failure: Keep the inspector open with focus contained

interactions.stateChange: Open a typed schedule editor with workspace defaults
interactions.failure: Keep the schedule list and explain missing capability

interactions.stateChange: Render timezone-aware upcoming occurrences without saving
interactions.failure: Mark the invalid field and retain other values

interactions.stateChange: Persist one schedule version with immutable authorization snapshot
interactions.failure: Retain the editor and show validation, conflict, or authorization state

interactions.stateChange: Pause future claims after server confirmation
interactions.failure: Keep current schedule state and announce the failure

interactions.stateChange: Resume future claims only after readiness is rechecked
interactions.failure: Keep paused and name the blocking runtime or authority state

interactions.stateChange: Submit one idempotent manual execution claim
interactions.failure: Do not duplicate a confirmed effect; expose existing execution when applicable

interactions.stateChange: Request cancellation and show pending until worker confirmation
interactions.failure: Keep truthful execution state and expose authorized recovery

interactions.stateChange: Schedule a bounded retry from the recorded failure
interactions.failure: Keep history and explain retry policy exhaustion

interactions.stateChange: Open the selected typed settings scope and focus its heading
interactions.failure: Keep the current section and explain access or load failure

interactions.stateChange: Persist validated values at their explicit scope
interactions.failure: Keep edits, mark exact invalid/conflicting fields, and preserve policy locks

interactions.stateChange: Run a bounded health check without exposing credential values
interactions.failure: Keep the connection disabled or degraded and show a redacted reason

interactions.stateChange: Begin the provider-owned reconnect flow with explicit permissions
interactions.failure: Retain the existing revoked/degraded state and offer retry

interactions.stateChange: Confirm consequences, revoke the connection, and remove active authority
interactions.failure: Do not claim revocation; show the stable reason and retry path

interactions.stateChange: Change presentation composition while preserving durable identity and authority
interactions.failure: Keep the last valid composition and explain invalid state

interactions.stateChange: Create one scoped invitation with selected role and expiry
interactions.failure: Keep entered address/role and explain policy or authorization failure

interactions.stateChange: Confirm consequences and apply server-authorized capability changes
interactions.failure: Keep the previous role and show the policy reason

interactions.stateChange: Assign authorized work to a workspace member and record activity
interactions.failure: Keep the prior assignee and explain stale or forbidden membership

interactions.stateChange: Append one workspace-scoped comment and notify mentioned authorized members
interactions.failure: Preserve the draft and show validation or access failure

interactions.stateChange: Add the current member as a watcher once
interactions.failure: Keep the previous watch state and explain unavailable notifications

interactions.stateChange: Open the request, evidence, and authorized decision controls
interactions.failure: Keep queue position and explain stale, revoked, or missing access

interactions.stateChange: Load an authorized workspace and clear workspace-bound selection safely
interactions.failure: Keep the current workspace and explain session or membership loss

interactions.stateChange: Consume a single-use challenge and register a proved node identity
interactions.failure: Remove sensitive fragments, keep unpaired state, and offer a new challenge

interactions.stateChange: Save an explicit authorized placement policy
interactions.failure: Keep the safer current policy and explain capability mismatch

interactions.stateChange: Confirm data, authority, credential, and tool consequences before enabling fallback
interactions.failure: Leave fallback disabled

interactions.stateChange: Submit one generation-fenced resume operation
interactions.failure: Keep lifecycle state truthful and offer local only when policy permits

interactions.stateChange: Retry the current runtime operation without creating a second generation
interactions.failure: Keep the last good data and announce offline or terminal state

interactions.stateChange: Cancel the pending operation and reconcile cleanup
interactions.failure: Show the still-active operation and escalate only through authorized kill controls

interactions.stateChange: Open redacted heartbeat, generation, capability, and cleanup evidence
interactions.failure: Keep summary state and show unavailable evidence

interactions.stateChange: Open remaining authorized routes in a semantic sheet
interactions.failure: Keep the four primary bottom actions usable and restore focus
